prompt:
Goal: Create a clean character pose sheet of one consistent isometric businesswoman in many presentation and work scenarios, suitable as a reusable illustration asset set.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 white or very light gray background, plenty of negative space, no borders, no title, no labels, no watermark.

Subject details: Show the same adult woman in all poses, with medium brown hair tied in a ponytail, simplified faceless or minimal facial features, light skin, slim professional build, wearing a sleeveless black top, black high-waisted wide-leg trousers, black flats, a thin belt, and a subtle necklace. Use a modern flat 3D isometric illustration style with soft shadows under each figure.

Layout: Arrange exactly 14 separate full-body character illustrations in two neat rows of 7, evenly spaced across the canvas. Each figure should have its own soft oval gray ground shadow and should not overlap the others.

Pose count and actions: Include exactly these 14 discrete poses: 1) standing and gesturing with both hands raised as if explaining, 2) standing while holding and looking at a small tablet, 3) standing with one hand in pocket and pointing to the side, 4) standing while holding up a gray cloth or sample fabric, 5) walking forward while carrying a slim folder or notebook, 6) jogging or hurrying while checking a smartphone, 7) standing and presenting with one hand while holding a clipboard or tablet, 8) side-facing presentation gesture with one arm extended, 9) standing with one hand raised in a stop or greeting gesture, 10) standing front-facing with one hand raised near the face, 11) standing with arms crossed confidently, 12) kneeling while taking a photo with a camera, 13) kneeling while placing or inspecting a small gray cube box, 14) bending slightly while writing on a tablet with a stylus and holding a walkie-talkie or handheld radio near the face.

Visual style: Soft isometric vector-like 3D, realistic but simplified proportions, consistent character design across all poses, warm skin tones, matte black clothing, subtle highlights and shadows, clean corporate presentation aesthetic.

Constraints: Keep all 14 figures consistent as the same person, maintain the exact two-row grid, avoid text, avoid extra props beyond the listed items, avoid background scenery, and keep the overall look polished, minimal, and presentation-ready.
